identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a digital workspace that feels like a physical intellectual studio. Reject the sterile 'SaaS Blue' aesthetic. Embrace the tactile warmth of paper, the precision of Swiss design, and the clarity of academic thought.
principles: Fusion: Digital precision meets Physical warmth (Paper & Ink)
Content: Documents are the heroes; UI is the frame
Negative Space: Give thoughts room to breathe

typography.instructions: Import these fonts from Google Fonts. Do NOT use default system fonts for headings.

headings.name: Newsreader
headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6), Hero text, 'Big Numbers' in stats.

body.name: Public Sans
body.usage: UI elements, navigation, document lists, dense text.

mono.name: JetBrains Mono
mono.usage: Citations, IDs, Code snippets, AI pharos keys.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight (-0.02em). Italicize emphasized words for editorial feel.

colors.description: A high-contrast, paper-inspired palette. Replaces 'sterile white' with 'warm paper' and 'pure black' with 'rich ink'.

texture.name: Paper Noise
texture.usage: Apply to the main app container background to break digital sterility.

button.hover: Translate Y -1px, shadow-md. Invert colors on hover for primary buttons.

card.style: Flat, 1px border. No massive shadows unless hovering. 'Physical Card' metaphor.
card.padding: p-6 or p-8. Generous internal spacing.

input.style: Minimalist. Background-transparent with bottom border ONLY (for 'form' feel) or standard solid background with sharp edges (for 'tool' feel).

badge.style: Pill shape (rounded-full). Low contrast background, high contrast text.

library.interaction: Clicking a row opens Detail Panel on the right (overlay or push).

paper_builder.specs: Left: PDF Viewer (50-60%), Right: Notes/AI Chat (40-50%)
paper_builder.mobile: Tabs to switch between PDF and Notes.

motion.philosophy: Micro-interactions only. No sweeping transitions that distract from reading.

definitions.modal_enter: scale-95 opacity-0 to scale-100 opacity-100 duration-200

landing_hero.description: Bright, minimalist workspace. Use as Hero image or background for login.
landing_hero.usage: Cover image with overlay for Login/Signup.

empty_state_library.description: Black and white pencil. Creative and minimal.

empty_state_upload.usage: Background for Drag & Drop Upload zone (low opacity).

textures.usage: Subtle textures for 'Paper Builder' mode backgrounds.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Maintain consistent padding: `p-6` or `p-8` for cards.
Dark mode should be 'Ink' (dark grey), not 'Void' (pure black).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE `tailwind.config.js` with the 'Swiss Scholar' palette defined in `colors`.
2. UPDATE `index.css` to import Google Fonts (Newsreader, Public Sans).
3. CREATE a `Layout` component that implements the sidebar/header structure.
4. BUILD the Dashboard using the Bento Grid layout.
5. IMPLEMENT the 'Paper Builder' with a split-screen resizable layout.
